headline: The Bull Case For Ventas (VTR) Could Change Following Fresh Q1 Results And Expanded 2026 Investment Pipeline
summary: In late April 2026, Ventas, Inc. plans to release its first-quarter 2026 results and host an investor conference call with webcast and replay access, following the close of New York Stock Exchange trading. At the same time, Baron Capital’s Baron Real Estate Income Fund increased its Ventas holdings, highlighting strong fundamentals and an investment pipeline expected to exceed US$2.50 billion in 2026, reinforcing institutional confidence in the senior housing theme. Against this backdrop...

headline: What Makes Ventas (VTR) an Investment Choice?
summary: Baron Capital, an investment management company, released its Q4 2025 letter for its “Baron Real Estate Income Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In 2025, the Fund appreciated 3.74% (Institutional Shares), exceeding the 1.68% gain for the MSCI US REIT Index (the REIT Index). In Q4 2025, the Fund declined modestly by 0.40%, […]
